web_results.snippet: When launching a rocket, several forces impact the rocket’s flight path: thrust, drag, lift, and weight. Before your students launch their model rockets, they need to understand aerodynamics. Understanding aerodynamics will allow your students to optimize their rockets’ shape, size, and flight path. ## Aerodynamic Forces Acting on a Model Rocket.
